title: GearBoss Carts — High School Replacement
openingLine: Hey, I'm the AD at Waco ISD. We're in the process of replacing Waco High School and I just learned about your GearBoss product. I have a drawing of our space — could you recommend what we may need?
customerContext: You manage athletics across the district and the new high school replacement is a once-in-a-generation chance to do storage right. You don't know much about Wenger but a peer AD in another district mentioned GearBoss. You're an action-oriented person who wants someone to look at your drawing and tell you what you need — you don't want a long sales process.

hiddenInfo.reveal: Football is biggest — 110 players, full pads. Then basketball, baseball, soccer, track, wrestling, volleyball, golf.
Two of our middle schools have older GearBoss shelving. Coaches like it.
District is on Sourcewell. We can buy direct on contract or run it through the GC.
Athletic FF&E budget for the new school is around $480K. GearBoss could be 30-40% of that.
We haven't looked at competitors seriously yet. You're the first call.
We've heard of AirPro lockers but haven't priced them. Football coach is interested.
School opens in 18 months. We need product on site about 3 months before that.
If this works, we have two more high schools and three middle schools to upgrade over the next 5 years.

Discovery & Qualification.behavior: Asked for inventory list by sport
Identified football as the highest-configuration sport
Checked Salesforce for previous GearBoss ownership in district
Asked whether other options are being considered

Solution Framing.behavior: Explained differences between team, X, and sport carts
Recommended carts based on sport-specific needs
Asked about including AirPro locker rooms

Opportunity Expansion.behavior: Suggested carts for all storage rooms
Identified other schools or districts needing this solution

BANT.behavior: Discussed budget considerations and asked the budget
Asked how products will be procured (contract vs. bid)

Timeline Awareness.behavior: Mapped delivery timeline against the 18-month school open
